510.reason: [Accessing tokens.get(index + 1) and tokens.get(index + 2) without checking if index+1 or index+2 are within bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, the condition logic is flawed for distinguishing declarations from function definitions.]

516.reason: [Same issue: accessing tokens.get(index + 1) without bounds checking can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Additionally, this condition doesn't properly identify function definitions.]
